name: cell-margin-per-side-cascade
description: Table-level margins: top=100, left=200, bottom=100, right=200. Cell (0,0) overrides only left=400 via tcMar. Per SS17.4.68, tcMar overrides tblCellMar — but the spec says 'shall override the table cell margins', meaning the entire set is replaced. So cell (0,0) should have left=400 and the other sides fall back to defaults (not from table-level).
